task_completion.description: Navigate to the Alert Profiles configuration page in ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Alert Profiles' or 'New Alert Profile' creation screen.

task_completion.description: Set the Alert Profile name to 'Local Admin Monitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Profile Name' input field contains exactly the text 'Local Admin Monitor'.
The 'Severity' setting is selected as 'Critical' (often indicated by a dropdown selection or a selected radio button, possibly with a red indicator).

task_completion.description: Select the 'Member Added to Local Group' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report, event, or category selection for the alert explicitly shows 'Member Added to Local Group' as the chosen trigger.

task_completion.description: Configure the filter criteria for the 'Administrators' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filter or criteria section displays a rule specifying that 'Group Name' contains (or equals) 'Administrators'.

task_completion.description: Enable and save the Alert Profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is a visual indication that the alert is enabled (e.g., an 'Enable' checkbox is checked) and the profile is successfully saved, either shown by a success message or its presence in the active alert profiles list.

integrity.description: Agent used the ADAudit Plus web GUI to configure the alert.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual ADAudit Plus web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or curl requests.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard ADAudit Plus UI elements and styling, not a local text editor, mock HTML file, or notes app.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots being used to manually alter the DOM text to match the required profile name or success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Alert Profile must be named exactly 'Local Admin Monitor'. The severity must be set to 'Critical'. The alert category/report must be 'Member Added to Local Group'. The filter criteria must check if the 'Group Name' contains 'Administrators'.
